title: 122nd Fighter Wing gets Indiana congressional support in bid for F-35 units
description:
In a letter sent Wednesday to United States Air Force Secretary Troy Meink, both of Indiana's senators and all nine representatives say the Fort Wayne base "has all the tools needed to succeed any F-35 mission."

description:

title: Seymour man agrees to plead guilty in connection with wire-selling scheme
description:

title: Maple Leaf Farms names new CFO
description:

title: Ballard campaign says it’s closing in on secretary of state ballot signature mark
description:
Greg Ballard’s independent campaign for secretary of state said Tuesday it has submitted at least 35,167 signatures to county clerks in his effort to appear on the ballot under the “Lincoln Party” designation.
